channel.title: GT Cafe Journal
channel.description: Coffee notes, garage morning rituals, gifting ideas, and road-ready releases from GT Cafe.

item.title: How to Build a Better Garage Morning
item.description: A simple ritual for early starts: prep the route, warm the cup, and make the first mile feel intentional.

item.title: Choosing the Right Coffee for a Weekend Route
item.description: Comfort flavors, smooth finishes, and sampler logic for drives that start before the rest of the house wakes up.

item.title: Cars and Coffee Gift Ideas That Actually Get Used
item.description: Why coffee bundles work for club events, client gifts, and the people who already have enough keychains.
